candidate_check.description: Extensions installation must be blocklisted by default.

check_content_excerpt:
The policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Extensions/Control which extensions cannot be installed" must be set to "Enabled".

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:
HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge\ExtensionInstallBlocklist\1

If the value for "1" is not set to "REG_SZ = *", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for "Computer Configuration/Administrative Templates/Microsoft Edge/Extensions/Control which extensions cannot be installed" to "Enabled". A list of blocklisted extensions may then be specified.
title: Extensions installation must be blocklisted by default.
